title: lepidium scopulorum
intro: Lepidium scopulorum, also known as Mountain Pepper Grass, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Lepidium scopulorum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
